title: Cheng's Imagine
description: I used MCreator to create the weapon of Rien in the game "Limbus Company" - the double snake staff.
body:
_This is a test module. I can't guarantee it's perfect. Please understand.__
I added the Double Snake Staff and the pager in the game.
The pager person enhances themselves.
The double snake staff has multiple forms that can inflict different attacks on enemies. Some of the weapons can also cause certain damage to the enemy or provide certain bonuses to the player.
**_All the contents of this module are based on the game "Limbus Company"_**

_这是一个测试模块。我无法保证它完美无缺。请谅解。__
我在游戏中添加了双蛇杖和寻呼机。
使用寻呼机可以强化。
双蛇杖有多种形态，可对敌人发动不同的攻击。部分武器还能对敌人造成更多伤害，或为玩家提供特定增益。
**_本模块所有内容均基于游戏《Limbus Company》。_**
